overview: Cashfessions is an anonymous investment confession platform for investor communities. Users generate a personal shareable link to collect anonymous confessions about investment mistakes. Confessions display as shareable cards with tags and timestamps on a public feed, while owners manage their submissions through a private dashboard.
features: Anonymous submission form with 'What's your biggest investment mistake?' prompt
Tag system: crypto, stocks, real estate, forex
Public confession feed with tag filtering
Shareable card design optimized for social media
Owner dashboard with delete and flag/hide moderation controls
Login-protected owner management via Internet Identity
No sender identity stored or shown — fully anonymous
